quote: If you want to turn a vision into reality, you have to give 100% and never stop believing in your dream. – Arnold Schwarzenegger
fact: The verb "cleave" is the only English word with two synonyms which are antonyms of each other: adhere and separate.
joke: Man, I really love my furniture... me and my recliner go way back.
